name: Above the Forest
description:
The forest looks so peaceful from up here.  The wars that are going on down
below are almost forgotten to you.  From here, you can't see the elves fighting
to save this city.  Your attention is on the sky and the trees.  From this
height everything looks like a painting.  If it wasn't for the arrow that
almost just struck you down, this would be the most peaceful place you've ever
been to.
